channel.title: ViMovies Blog
channel.description: Streaming guides, reviews, and Android TV / Google TV tips from the ViMovies team.

item.title: How to Install ViMovies: Complete Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to install ViMovies on Android TV, Google TV, Fire TV, and Android phones. Includes troubleshooting tips and safety checks.

item.title: ViMovies Review (2026): We Tested It on TV and Mobile
item.description: Honest hands-on ViMovies review for 2026. We tested the interface, streaming quality, TV performance, and offline mode. Here's our full verdict.

item.title: ViMovies vs Stremio: Full Comparison for 2026
item.description: ViMovies vs Stremio compared: setup difficulty, TV interface, playback, downloads, and device support. Find out which free streaming app fits you best.

item.title: The 10 Best Free Movie Apps in 2026
item.description: We tested the best free movie apps of 2026: ViMovies, Tubi, Pluto TV, Plex, Stremio and more. Compare catalogs, ads, TV support, and offline features.

item.title: Best Movie Apps for Android TV: 2026 Rankings
item.description: The best movie apps for Android TV in 2026, ranked by remote navigation, performance on TV boxes, catalog quality, and 4K support. All free options.

item.title: The Best Free Movie App for Google TV (and How to Install It)
item.description: Looking for a free movie app for Google TV? Learn how to install ViMovies on Chromecast with Google TV, plus the best free alternatives in 2026.

item.title: Best Streaming Apps Without a Subscription (2026)
item.description: 7 genuinely free streaming apps with no subscription in 2026 — no trials, no credit cards. Tested on TV and mobile, with a comparison table.

item.title: Best Free Apps Like Netflix in 2026
item.description: Free Netflix alternatives that actually feel like Netflix: ViMovies, Tubi, Plex and more. Compare interfaces, catalogs, and TV support for 2026.

item.title: ViMovies Not Working? Here's Every Fix, In Order
item.description: ViMovies won't open, buffers, or shows no sources? Work through these fixes in order — from cache clearing to network changes — and get streaming again fast.

item.title: Is ViMovies Safe? An Honest Answer
item.description: Is the ViMovies APK safe to install? We cover permissions, data collection, sideloading risks, fake mirror sites, and the legal questions people actually ask.

item.title: How to Sideload Apps on Google TV and Android TV
item.description: Sideload any APK on Google TV, Chromecast, or Android TV. Three methods compared — Send Files to TV, Downloader, and USB — with exact steps for each.
